narrative: An NLP Engineer with 16 years of experience at Nykaa, a product‑first firm, based in Mumbai. Strong verified skill depth—demonstrated by deep work on Learning‑to‑Rank, Elasticsearch, BM25 and Weaviate—drives the primary ranking boost. Their background also shows solid breadth of technical skills, including scikit‑learn and extensive NLP work, aligning well with the search and retrieval focus of the role. However, the candidate’s location in Mumbai and an unknown notice period reduce availability fit, platform engagement is below average, and minor credibility concerns were flagged, keeping the overall ranking low.
